name: zapier-supported-storage
description: Reads and writes Zapier Storage key/value records.

risk.read: external Zapier Storage API read of stored key/value records
risk.write: external mutation of a shared per-Zap/per-app key/value store: set/increment a single key, delete a single key, or wipe the entire bucket (delete_all_records, destructive)
risk.approval: required for write actions; delete_all_records requires explicit destructive confirmation
